---
title: "Comparing weighted vs unweighted"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
.libPaths("/enna/nobackup/biostat/Rpackages/v4/")
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(lmerTest)
  library(spicyR)
  library(SpatialDatasets)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(tidySingleCellExperiment)
  library(scClassify)
  library(caret) 
  library(spatstat.geom)
  library(data.table)
  library(Statial)
  library(BiocParallel)
})
```

```{r}
load(".RData")
```


```{r}
# overall accuracy
mean(speSub$cellType == speSub$predLabels)
```

```{r}
# breakdown by cell type... yikes
speSub |> colData() |> as.data.frame() |>
  dplyr::group_by(cellType) |>
  dplyr::summarise(n = dplyr::n(),
    accuracy = mean(cellType == predLabels)) |>
  dplyr::arrange(accuracy)
```

```{r}
weightsModels |> arrange(p.value)
```


```{r}
noWeightsModels |> arrange(p.value)
```
